items.title: MCP server — 9 tools shipped
items.body: All 9 MCP tools live: extract_profile, pack_profile, validate_profile, list_profile, add_shortcut, generate_icons, list_shortcuts, quality_check, live_test_profile.

items.title: Agent 3: install-profile.js
items.body: Filesystem copy to ProfilesV3/, match by Name, UUID backup collision handling. Ships as part of the live_test_profile MCP tool flow.

items.title: Agent 3: verify-profile.js
items.body: Kill/relaunch Stream Deck app, verify file structure and button count, emit test-report.json.

items.title: Agent 3: live_test_profile MCP tool (tool 9)
items.body: Wraps install + verify, returns structured verdict + button count + mismatches. Ninth MCP tool.

items.title: v2.2.0 GitHub Release
items.body: Tagged v2.2.0, GitHub Release created with full release notes. Includes 9-tool MCP server, 3 skills, plugin manifest, marketplace distribution prep.

items.title: Claude Code plugin manifest (marketplace.json + plugin.json)
items.body: `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` and `plugin.json` at v2.2.0. Five distribution channels listed. Ready for Claude Code plugin marketplace.

items.title: 3 Claude Code skills with correct SKILL.md frontmatter
items.body: generate-profile, capture-streamdeck-reference, drive-windows-gui — all have `name:` + `description:` fields for vercel-labs/skills auto-discovery.

items.title: Reference profile — all action type schemas captured
items.body: 5-page reference profile covering all known Stream Deck built-in action types. Includes Pinned Actions page (Pages.Default), transparent gradient button shading, white border ring, page-colored nav corners. Schema for Pin captured via user-guided live manifest diff.

items.title: Marketplace submission — claudemarketplaces.com
items.body: GitHub issue #52 submitted 2026-04-23 requesting indexing of thisis-romar/opendeck-factory. Auto-index from `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`.

items.title: Marketplace submission — skills.sh / npx skills (vercel-labs)
items.body: GitHub issue #990 submitted to vercel-labs/skills 2026-04-23. Auto-discovered from `.claude/skills/*/SKILL.md` with valid frontmatter.

items.title: Marketplace submission — claudeskills.info (manual)
items.body: Manual browser visit required to https://claudeskills.info — find Submit in nav, enter repo URL https://github.com/thisis-romar/opendeck-factory. Returns 403 to automation.

items.title: Marketplace submission — skillsmp.com (star gate ≥2)
items.body: Pure auto-scrape of GitHub. No action needed until repo reaches 2 stars. Check https://skillsmp.com after star gate is met.

items.title: Marketplace submission — awesome-claude-skills PR (star gate ≥10)
items.body:
PR entry ready: `- **[OpenDeck Factory](https://github.com/thisis-romar/opendeck-factory)** — Generate Elgato Stream Deck profiles from code. 9-tool MCP server + Claude Code plugin with 3 skills.`

Open PR to travisvn/awesome-claude-skills README under 'Tools & Utilities' only after ≥10 stars.

items.title: GitHub Projects v2 board — OpenDeck Roadmap
items.body:
Create Projects v2 board with 4 custom fields (Status, Priority, Area, Target). Sync all work items as GitHub issues. Scripts: `scripts/gh-project-setup.js` + `scripts/gh-project-sync.js`.

Board live at https://github.com/users/thisis-romar/projects/4

items.title: Git hooks migration — .githooks/ + commitlint
items.body: Move hooks from .git/hooks/ to .githooks/ for version control. Add commitlint for consistent commit message format.

items.title: CHANGELOG.md automation — git-cliff
items.body: Adopt Keep-a-Changelog format + git-cliff for automated changelog generation on release.

items.title: Catalog v1 — VS Code profile pack
items.body: First commercial product: full VS Code shortcuts profile with category-colored icons, multi-page layout, chord shortcuts. Target: stream-deck-catalog repo. First revenue milestone.

items.title: Agentic pipeline v1 — Agents 1 + 2 (Asset Spec + Build)
items.body: Agent 1: generate asset spec from app keyboard shortcut docs. Agent 2: build full profile pack from spec. Closes the loop from app docs → importable .streamDeckProfile.

items.title: Discover elgato-mcp-server tool list
items.body: Audit the elgato-mcp-server project to understand what tools are available and whether any overlap with or can replace opendeck-factory MCP tools.

items.title: Pro tier — hosted icon generation
items.body: SaaS feature: upload shortcut JSON, receive generated SVG icon pack. Enables non-technical users to generate profiles without running the CLI.

items.title: Enterprise tier — org catalog + SSO
items.body: Enterprise licensing: per-org profile catalog, SSO integration, team management. Q4 2026 milestone.
